programmes.show_description: Crime comedy with Sean Connery. Reformed crook Vito has turned over a new leaf, but is forced to abandon the straight and narrow to take part in a robbery planned by his father and his son.
Action thriller with Dolph Lundgren. When a Grand Jury witness is murdered, former government agent Jason Price finds himself caught in a frightening spiral where no one can be trusted.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A man's demeanour in court leads the Judge to rule that she wouldn't let him drive a tricycle let alone a car which he is accused of wrecking.
Unwed parents of a six-year-old girl fight over a tax refund after alleged jail time, job loss and drug possession.
A woman sues her former friend for profits from a litter of pit bulls and for allegedly making a false arrest.
Teenagers rumoured to have a history with the police are accused of damaging their own apartment; their mother is sued for repairs.
A young man insists that he was doing his landlord a favour by ripping out all her kitchen appliances shortly before he moved out.
A woman claims her nephew shot her in the head with a BB gun; her sister claims she broke in and stole her belongings.
A woman's violent past comes back to haunt her when she points the harassment finger at a woman she neglected to pay back for an earlier crime.
After a pizza delivery driver hears a 'thump' while driving, he discovers that a 9-year-old boy accidentally ran into his car while playing in the street.
The Judge states the obvious to make a comparison between a young man who brings his new, half-clothed girlfriend to court out of alleged spite for his ex.

In the UK, a woman is found murdered after reporting stalking. In Texas, a woman is found shot dead outside her home.
In Texas, surveillance catches a killer out. In Washington State, a man's vlogs reveal his dark plans.
Lorenzen Wright was a superstar player in the NBA and a hometown hero. That ended in July 2010 during a call to 911. The chilling recording captured his dying words.
The decomposed bodies of two victims are found in an irrigation canal in Bakersfield, California, but how can a killer be caught if evidence is washed away?
Tight-Fitting Genes: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. A loan shark, who has a minister's son under his thumb, attempts to steal a charitable telethon's proceeds.
Action comedy with Woody Harrelson. Two New York cops plan to rob a train carrying all the day's takings from the city's subway network, but a pyromaniac serial killer threatens their plans.
Action thriller sequel with Sylvester Stallone. When a member of his team goes missing, Ray Breslin is forced to return to the seemingly impenetrable prison he once escaped from.
Action thriller with Henry Cavill. A police officer and a vigilante are caught up in a dangerous scheme involving a troubled, recently-arrested man who is linked to years of female abductions.
Spy thriller with Michael Caine. An MI6 defector has his appearance altered by the KGB and is sent back to steal documents - but decides to play both sides against each other for his own gain.

A woman claims she was falsely arrested for domestic violence and explains how her boyfriend got his scratches.
When alcohol and alleged idiocy come into play, the Judge reminds litigants that lunch is right around the corner if they can't prove their case.
A man's story changes when he describes damages to his beloved Harley and the allegedly shoddy care taken by a mechanic.
A man and woman meet online and opt for a business rather than romantic relationship; she accuses him of inappropriate behaviour.
After allegedly being spat on, a woman sprays her neighbour in the face and says the baby she was holding was collateral damage.

A wealthy lawyer shoots his wife from the backseat of a car - was it a tragic accident or cold-blooded murder?
An NHS manager cooks up a scam with his mates to line their pockets with two hundred and fifty thousand pounds.
In December 2000, Mike Williams headed out onto the lake to hunt for ducks and never returned. It was believed he drowned and was eaten by alligators.
A Violent Night: In this programme, each episode reveals a new murder in which the killer or victim lived a life of luxury and wealth.

After being chased on horseback by a mysterious and terrifying figure dressed in black hours before her engagement, a woman faces the biggest decision of her life.
As a spy is about to be hanged, the rope breaks and he falls to the water below. Finally free, he races home - and learns the terrible truth of his future.
Action adventure based on Michael Crichton's novel, with Dylan Walsh. A team of explorers looking for King Solomon's diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace.
Western with Sam Worthington. An outlaw learns of a prophecy that claims one of his estranged children will kill him, and decides to hunt down each of them and end the curse.
